ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of operation */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the procedure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procedure */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of required documents for the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for completing the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., survey, workshop, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_tasks" (
  "student_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student task */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., completed, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_tasks_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_procedures" (
  "student_procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student procedure */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the procedure was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procedure (e.g., completed, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_procedures_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_procedures_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_procedures" (
  "office_procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office procedure */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_procedures_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_procedures_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reminders_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_reminders_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedure_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedure_reminders_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedure_reminders_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_clearance" (
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clearance */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "clearance_date" TEXT /* Date the student cleared graduation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clearance (e.g., cleared, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_clearance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_development" (
  "career_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the career activity */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was completed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., workshop, internship, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_development_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exit_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "responses" TEXT /* Responses to the survey questions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_surveys_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_notes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., transcript, diploma, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_documents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
